title: GLM-5.2 + OpenDesign: SOTA CHEAP DESIGN SYSTEM! This is AWESOME!
summary: This video demonstrates how to combine GLM-5.2 with Open Design to generate high-quality UI prototypes including landing pages, dashboards, and mobile interfaces. The workflow produces polished HTML and CSS artifacts using an open-source stack.
writeup: The video pairs GLM-5.2 with Open Design to generate UI prototypes, covering landing pages, dashboards, and mobile interfaces. The workflow outputs polished HTML and CSS artifacts and relies on an open-source stack, which keeps the setup low-cost. The takeaway is a practical path for producing design system mockups from prompts without proprietary tooling.
